index.title: Securities
index.description: Review total account valuations and daily valuation trends by position.
index.emptyAccounts: No securities accounts found. Add one from Accounts.

latestAccounts.title: Latest Valuation by Account
latestAccounts.description: The latest valuation acquired within the selected {{period}} period.

accountTrend.title: Account Valuation Trends
accountTrend.description: Compares daily valuations saved as account totals.
accountTrend.empty: No account valuations in this period.

positionTrend.title: Position Valuation Trends
positionTrend.description: Expand an account to review how its position mix changed in a stacked area chart.
positionTrend.emptyBreakdown: No position breakdown in this period.
positionTrend.emptyValuation: No position valuations in this period.

show.description: Review account valuation history and position details.

period.title: Period
period.description: Compare valuations within the selected period.

valuation.title: Account Valuation
valuation.description: Calculates the period change from the first and last valuations in {{period}}.
valuation.needTwoDays: At least two days are required for comparison
valuation.chartEmpty: No account valuations in this period.

positionDetail.noMetadata: No instrument code or asset class
positionDetail.chartEmpty: No valuation or acquisition cost data in this period.
positionDetail.acquisitionMissing: Acquisition cost is unavailable for this period. Import the latest Money Forward balance JSON to compare it.

positions.title: Latest Position Breakdown
positions.description: Breakdown acquired on {{date}}. Select a position to view its daily history.
positions.noData: No position breakdown in this period.
positions.importPrompt: Import valuation data that includes position details.

snapshots.title: Valuation History
snapshots.description: Account-level acquisition history. Open the original import when a valuation came from imported data.
snapshots.empty: No valuation history in this period.

stacked.selectPrompt: Select positions above to display the stacked chart.
stacked.description: The total band height is the combined valuation of displayed positions. Select a position name to toggle it.

comparison.selectPrompt: Select items above to display the chart.
